calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-26-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk:M. Vallejo, CSR. David Davenport.
Arnold W. Evje, Esq., for Plaintiff.
Defendant Dorothy Toines, present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Signed by the parties, but not read into the record.
Stipulation for judgment filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
